title: ConvergenceDelta
description: A delta in the convergence map produced by a factory research run. The unit of output — not a document.

crack_id.description: The crack or opening this delta addresses.

type.description: Which factory pipeline produced this delta.

entries.description: Coupling entries added or modified by this delta.

call_type.description: Whether this is a measure() or predict() entry.

convergence_shift.description: Computed convergence metrics before and after this delta.

crack_resolution_score.description: Negative shift in sigma-tension at the cracked inference step.

opening_extension_score.description: Positive shift in convergence status for the opening's target property.

echo_chamber_break_score.description: Introduction of independent instrument cluster previously absent.

common_ground_depth_score.description: Increase in independent instruments for the Common-Ground entity.

cost_usd.description: Total cost of the research run that produced this delta.
